steps.assistant_text: Spill-slot residual (r1 caller-save spill 0x24 vs target 0x28, the 'E6E8-class irreducible inverted slot ordering' cap from 2026-06-10) retracted by the dead-scalar-home frame-map lever: named locals reserve home slots TOP-DOWN in decl order even when fully colored (dead homes). Old decl order slotC4,slotCC,r1,r2 mapped r1 to 3rd slot 0x24; interleaving to slotC4,r1,slotCC,r2 maps r1's spill to 0x28 with dead holes at 0x2C/0x24 and r2's spill at 0x20, matching the target frame exactly. Plain reorder suffices (int * volatile r1 in position 2 also exact but unnecessary). The 2026-06-10 16-variant grind only permuted pads/r1-r2 pairs, never interleaved the dead pointer homes.

metadata.verification: word-diff 43/43 vs raw .s + full make RUN_CC_CHECK=0 + cmp tenshoe.z64 baserom.z64 byte-identical
